description: Create a new page in a Notion workspace or database. Supports title, body text, and optional properties for database entries.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Notion new page creation: click '+ New page' in sidebar or use keyboard shortcut. The new page opens with a title field (contenteditable with placeholder 'Untitled'). After typing title and pressing Enter, cursor moves to body. For database entries, navigate to the database view and click '+ New' button. The row opens as a full page with property fields.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Navigate to parent page or database URL. Use keyboard shortcut Ctrl+N (or click '+' in sidebar) to create new page. Title field: .notion-page-block [contenteditable][placeholder='Untitled']. Body: first .notion-text-block [contenteditable] after title. After typing title + Enter, body is auto-focused.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Notion auto-saves content in real-time — no explicit save button needed. Type title with 60-100ms delays. Wait 2s after each block of text for autosave to persist. Notion does not have aggressive bot detection for write operations with valid session.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 4s + new page creation 2s + title typing ~5s + body typing variable + autosave 2s = ~15-20s.

parent_url.description: URL of parent page or workspace where new page will be created

body.description: Page body content (plain text, first paragraph)
body.example:
Attendees: Alice, Bob, Charlie

Agenda:
1. Q1 planning
2. Roadmap review

steps.description: Navigate to parent page or workspace
Verify authenticated — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED if login page
Create new page via keyboard shortcut
Wait for new page title field to appear
Type the page title with human-like delays
Press Enter to move to page body
Wait for Notion autosave to persist content
Capture URL of newly created page
Return creation result with page URL

error_handling.session_expired: Detect notion.so/login redirect — run notion-oauth-login recipe first
error_handling.keyboard_shortcut_failed: Fallback: look for '+' button in sidebar and click it to create page
error_handling.autosave_failed: Detect offline indicator — wait 5s and retry, then abort
